response.justification: Despite extensive experience, the candidate is overqualified and misaligned with the junior/mid-level role; their resume shows senior leadership and complex system design far beyond the scope of this position, with no clear evidence of recent React/Nest.js or PostgreSQL use in relevant domains, and German language proficiency is only basic despite high on-site requirements in Berlin.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and full-stack experience across multiple frameworks
Proven ability to build scalable systems and integrate diverse data sources
Active open-source contributions and deep understanding of software architecture
concerns: Overqualified for junior/mid-level role with 10+ years of senior experience
Lack of recent React/Nest.js or PostgreSQL work in renewable energy/construction tech context
Basic German proficiency conflicts with high on-site presence requirement in Berlin
